metadata.title: Univest: Stocks, F&O, Equity
metadata.description: Simplify your investment journey with Univest, an all-in-one stock market platform for every investor. It provides high-quality stock market recommendations to over 30 lac users backed by the research of its SEBI-registered research analysts . Univest brings a solution to all your investing needs at the convenience of your palm. It is your on-the-go stock market partner for a seamless investing experience. Whether you are a futures trader, an options or commodities trader, or an investor for the long term, Univest caters to all your requirements. So, download and register on the Univest app and avail yourself of a seven-day free trial and receive five share market tips for free. Key takeaways about Univest: Quality stock market tips Whether it is long-term wealth creation or income generation in the short term, Univest has you covered through short, medium and long-term stock market tips for investing in equity, futures, options and commodities. Users also receive a detailed report along with a stock tip that helps them in making an investment decision. Stock market recommendations with minimised risk Risk is an unavoidable element of stock market investing, but it can always be controlled. Thus, to assist its users in investing safely in the share market, the research analysts of Univest give stock market suggestions that have high upside potential with good risk to reward ratio. Stock market tips through low-cost subscription plans We understand the financial capabilities of Indian investors very well. Therefore, to offer our services to every investor, Univest provides stock market suggestions to its users at affordable prices, which are as low as Rs. 183 per month. Also, the subscription plans are curated to meet the varied needs of the investors, thus making them accessible to everyone. Stock market recommendations by experienced research analysts Univest has a team of SEBI-registered research analysts who collectively have 75+ years of experience in stock market research and trading. These analysts constantly work round the clock to maintain accuracy and transparency in the stock market recommendations provided to the users. Stock market suggestions for timely exit Exiting a bad investment at the right time is as important as taking an entry in the right one. Therefore, Univest assists you in taking a timely exit from your bad investments so that you can decrease or avoid any potential losses. Portfolio tracker Univest's portfolio tracker provides you with a “Buy - Sell - Hold” rating on your investments for near and long term view to maintain a healthy portfolio and lets you avoid the hassle of regularly checking the performance of your investments. Effective and fast communication Investing in the share market is all about the right timing. Thus, to assist you in making the right call at the right time, Univest provides timely trade alerts through WhatsApp, push notifications and Telegram channel. By providing users with timely trade alerts, Univest increases its users potential gains while simultaneously curtailing their losses. Stock market mentor Univest focuses on making its users well-informed decision makers in the share market. It offers high-quality, informative content through blogs, articles, webinars and other research tools. Now, you can learn about share market investing at your convenience with our regular updates and analysis on various developments in the share market. Univest's Subsidiary is : Uniresearch India Pvt Ltd, a SEBI-reg. research analyst (INH000013776) Disclaimer: Investment in the securities market are subject to market risks. Read all the related documents carefully before investing. https://stocks.univest.in/privacy-policy Address: Ground floor, UNITECH COMMERCIAL TOWER, 2, Arya Samaj Rd, Block B, Greenwood City, Sector 45, Gurugram, Haryana 122003
metadata.description_html:
Simplify your investment journey with Univest, an all-in-one stock market platform for every investor. It provides high-quality stock market recommendations to over 30 lac users backed by the research of its SEBI-registered research analysts . Univest brings a solution to all your investing needs at the convenience of your palm. It is your on-the-go stock market partner for a seamless investing experience.

Whether you are a futures trader, an options or commodities trader, or an investor for the long term, Univest caters to all your requirements. So, download and register on the Univest app and avail yourself of a seven-day free trial and receive five share market tips for free.

Key takeaways about Univest:

Quality stock market tips
Whether it is long-term wealth creation or income generation in the short term, Univest has you covered through short, medium and long-term stock market tips for investing in equity, futures, options and commodities. Users also receive a detailed report along with a stock tip that helps them in making an investment decision.

Stock market recommendations with minimised risk
Risk is an unavoidable element of stock market investing, but it can always be controlled. Thus, to assist its users in investing safely in the share market, the research analysts of Univest give stock market suggestions that have high upside potential with good risk to reward ratio.

Stock market tips through low-cost subscription plans
We understand the financial capabilities of Indian investors very well. Therefore, to offer our services to every investor, Univest provides stock market suggestions to its users at affordable prices, which are as low as Rs. 183 per month. Also, the subscription plans are curated to meet the varied needs of the investors, thus making them accessible to everyone.

Stock market recommendations by experienced research analysts
Univest has a team of SEBI-registered research analysts who collectively have 75+ years of experience in stock market research and trading. These analysts constantly work round the clock to maintain accuracy and transparency in the stock market recommendations provided to the users.

Stock market suggestions for timely exit
Exiting a bad investment at the right time is as important as taking an entry in the right one. Therefore, Univest assists you in taking a timely exit from your bad investments so that you can decrease or avoid any potential losses.

Portfolio tracker
Univest's portfolio tracker provides you with a “Buy - Sell - Hold” rating on your investments for near and long term view to maintain a healthy portfolio and lets you avoid the hassle of regularly checking the performance of your investments.

Effective and fast communication
Investing in the share market is all about the right timing. Thus, to assist you in making the right call at the right time, Univest provides timely trade alerts through WhatsApp, push notifications and Telegram channel. By providing users with timely trade alerts, Univest increases its users potential gains while simultaneously curtailing their losses.

Stock market mentor
Univest focuses on making its users well-informed decision makers in the share market. It offers high-quality, informative content through blogs, articles, webinars and other research tools. Now, you can learn about share market investing at your convenience with our regular updates and analysis on various developments in the share market.

Univest's Subsidiary is : Uniresearch India Pvt Ltd, a SEBI-reg. research analyst (INH000013776)
Disclaimer: Investment in the securities market are subject to market risks. Read all the related documents carefully before investing.

https://stocks.univest.in/privacy-policy

Address: Ground floor, UNITECH COMMERCIAL TOWER, 2, Arya Samaj Rd, Block B, Greenwood City, Sector 45, Gurugram, Haryana 122003
metadata.summary: Simplify your investment journey with Univest, an all-in-one stock market platform for every investor. It provides high-quality stock market recommendations to over  <b>30 lac users backed by the rese

reviews.author: Faraz Khan
reviews.content: I subscribed to Univest based on their representative Naveen’s advice to skip the trial and directly opt for the 3-month plan. He explicitly assured me I could switch to any other plan at no extra cost if I didn’t like the existing one. Trusting this, I made the payment. Barely a day later, when I requested a plan change, Naveen flatly refused and demanded an extra payment for the new plan. This is a clear case of mis-selling and a broken promise. Request don't waste your time and money.

reviews.author: Shailesh Maru
reviews.content: Please guys, don't download this app. It's a very useless app. They're all here to rip you off. I bought it for 2000 rupees just to try it out. They took me on a scheme and took another 10,000 rupees from me. And it has been only one day now and they are harassing me by continuously calling me saying that another 12000 rupees add on scheme, Saying we will offer you 6 year more. And since yesterday, I've received over 50 calls. Open a demat account and come up with new schemes just to make money.

reviews.author: Volker Giesbrecht
reviews.content: Fraud app no. 1! After selecting Rs. 2799,- plan for 3 months they withdraw frow Your bank account daily Rs. 2799, - until Your bank account is empty. They want their money quick without doing anything. Most of their option tips are loss-making. Or taking both sides PUT + CALL too makes heavy losses. Their tips are false. Unistall their app quickly. And block their auto-pay from Google Playstore and Your bank account before it's too late.

reviews.author: Varad Raut
reviews.content: Worst app ever. What kind of app does not allow the user to delete their account. To even delete the account you have to go to some site and lodge a complaint. Even after doing so, their employees still call to tell you about offers but no one reaches to address your issue. One star is compulsory to post a review but honestly I'd give a 0 star to this app

reviews.author: Sourav Mukherjee
reviews.content: I would rate this app negatively if option was there. None of the recommendations works. The maximum profit they can get you is 1% that too by luck I guess. 9 out of 10 recommendations would be in loss. Percentage of loss making recommendations are too high. Not sure what kind of analysis is done at the backend. There is no difference in trading by one self and taking their help apart from knowing the stock names to research. One good thing is that we can access details for any stock to research

reviews.author: SURESHH Chandra Kainthola
reviews.content: I didn't like the app.. took the subscription of 3 months thought it will give some good swing trade opportunities however there is opportunities but without stop-loss so you don't know what is your Risk reward. Moreover they are changing stop-loss accordingly. I was watching LIC housing finance which is falling continuously and they are giving buy call and asking to average. I really don't like the way they are providing Stock ideas without any stop-loss. Good to just check which the stock rec

reviews.author: Rohit Gupta
reviews.content: Very bad experience with the Univest app. I trusted it during a time when I was already under financial pressure, and instead of helping, it added more stress. I followed their recommendations and ended up losing around ₹7,000. There was no proper stop-loss guidance, and updates were not timely. Watching my loss increase without clear direction was honestly very frustrating. It felt like I was completely on my own after entering the trade. This kind of experience really affects confidence.

reviews.author: Screensaver X
reviews.content: Really Bad Experience as a SUBSCRIBED member. I expect an easy access of information and recommendations for example, buy this STOCK at 110.00, target 120.00 and stoploss 105.00 for a duration of 1 to 3 months straight as a notification to the subscribed members for a quick decision time. Instead, they will force you to open the app, close all their advertisements and find the recomended stock on the list page. By the time, user does so, the price has fluctuated beyond the range. TOTAL WASTE.

reviews.author: Hiren Bhavsar
reviews.content: worst app. Don't please go with any subscription plans. if you go with one then they keep on advertising you to upgrade to the higher plan whenever you open the app. This is really frustrating.

reviews.author: Pradyumna G Limaye
reviews.content: issues 1. Short term delivery trade ideas are closed where hardly any profit is left after paying brokerage 2. App & brokerage Subscription purchase spam notifications arrive randomly in between OR on screen while starting app every time, even when multiyear subscription is already active

reviews.author: Aalok Kapoor
reviews.content: Not making much sense to get paid membership. they post futures ideas and the entry range much later and they are already out of range. profits are less, losses are huge. options are horrible, profits in 1 to 3k range most of the times and losses are in 10 to 30k range

reviews.author: Aviral Rastogi
reviews.content: Very disappointing experience. ₹2,831 was deducted from my ledger for the Trader’s Plan (Broking)—for the second time—without any prior notice or consent. I had already cancelled the auto-debit mandate via PhonePe, yet deductions are still happening. As a Pro Super User who has paid ~₹20,000, this lack of transparency and control is unacceptable. Quantum of losses in terms of value is way high in comparison to profits. Not Recommending this App.

reviews.author: arun kumar sharma
reviews.content: its a sham... there are 100s of types of subscriptions... I bought one subscription of 1.5 years plan and from the very next day - I get daily calls from univest on buy this plan, buy that plan... Not even a single call on how to get better out of the current subscription plan..... Dont fall into trap of buying premium subscriptions on Univest - hardly any value and constant annoying....

reviews.author: pankaj kumar
reviews.content: its complete package buy mafia , I upgraded to loyality on call but they did not update, every time I upgrade u will get a call to upgrade on higher , and they will tell u sir there was a contraint on ur previous upgrade . inshort do not go behind this app , they are many better apps.

reviews.author: Arunesh Mani
reviews.content: This app is highly misleading and feels like a scam. I paid ₹1 for a subscription, but they secretly enabled autopay and deducted ₹2800 without proper consent or clear communication. This is unacceptable. Worse, they call themselves a trading platform but don’t even provide instant customer support or a proper call service. How can users trust such a platform with their money? Avoid this app unless you want unexpected deductions and zero support.

reviews.author: RAKESH B J
reviews.content: Don't buy any plans, either they suggest equity stock for 1-3 months for profit or They suggest Trades over 50k - 1Lakh pricing range for profit, so normal middle class person cannot afford, Very bad app interface, entry exit price not simplified, They also use telegram along with app that is frustrating. No app notification for buying selling stocks after subscription of pro/edge plans. We have to go through app and find stocks.

reviews.author: ketan sethi
reviews.content: You’ve probably seen Univest ads all over social media, YouTube, maybe even in your dreams if you’re into trading. If you haven’t bought their subscription yet — congratulations. You’re already in profit. Because avoiding a loss is also a profit, and this app will most likely drain you both

reviews.author: S K
reviews.content: Really disappointed with the Univest app. I trusted their recommendation thinking it was backed by proper analysis, but it ended up costing me around ₹8,000 in losses. The worst part is that there was no proper update when the trade started going in the wrong direction. I kept checking the app again and again, expecting some guidance, but nothing useful came. This is extremely frustrating because users rely on these signals. If the app cannot provide timely updates, then what’s the point? It jus

reviews.author: Sampad Sarangi
reviews.content: Third class recommendation of stocks. They suggest stocks but most of the time without stoploss. All of the stocks recommended by them are mostly 25% down whereas they have asked to book profit in a few at 2-3%. I have asked their customer care why not providing sl they said the market is volatile and sl will be triggered. You can earn money going contra with them like whenever a stock is recommended you can short them and you will get good results.

reviews.author: ADGO
reviews.content: totally fake.. they dont even reponds over calls and queries, neither resolves the issues.. have called n number of times to them but they didn't resolved the issue . they just debit your account again and again. plz dont ever share any of your bank details to them. else they will auto debit your amount and will not even refund the same.

reviews.author: Omprakash Prajapati
reviews.content: Univest app is not worth and many time it not open timely or poor response... Subscription plan is also not fruitful..it would be good if you trade with your own..

reviews.author: Priyank Tyagi
reviews.content: This app suggests 80 stocks for short-, mid-, and long-term investment, but all the stocks are currently in negative returns. If it suggests investing in 80 stocks and averaging them, where will I get so much money? all rating paid don't belive it

reviews.author: Rohan Kumar
reviews.content: One thing that really made me angry about the Univest app is the lack of proper exit guidance. I entered a trade based on their suggestion, but when the stock started falling, there was no update on what to do. I kept waiting, hoping for some direction, but nothing came. In the end, I had to exit on my own with a loss of around ₹5,500. This is not acceptable for a platform that claims to guide users. If you are giving entry signals, you should also provide clear exit guidance. Otherwise, users a

reviews.author: Naga Srinivas G
reviews.content: Please stop mixing Services and Trading with aggressive marketing. When I open a trading app, I expect instant access to my positions, not banners and constant upgrade pushes. I am already subscribed to a plan, which means my requirement is clear until expiry. Yet the app keeps promoting more. Compare this with other full service brokers who focus on clean interface and usability. This marketing overload is making me lose interest in trading and holding investments here.

reviews.author: Nisar Ahmed
reviews.content: it's worst app I have taken subscribation for 18months it's waste of money they only sale there subscribation they won't solve the problem when we call coustomer care again they convince u to buy more subscribation... only now to sale the subscription.... Don't buy any subscription it's waste of money...

reviews.author: Hanumanthreddy Katreddy
reviews.content: i took subscription, still app always display subscription plans on landing page when I click on any alert. we cannot trade or rely on it

reviews.author: harsh agrawal
reviews.content: SCAM & FRAUD!! Don't ever download this app! they will start calling you 100 times a day to beg for subscription! fake ads BEWARE! I have already told their customer service representatives a million times to stop calling, and blocked multiple numbers, but they keep calling from different numbers to BEG!! DO NOT DOWNLOAD ps. now these beggars are even calling at odd beyond office hours. on weekends too! SUCH A BIG SCAM! NOW I WILL POST THIS ON SOCIALS AND TAG THEM IN THIS FRAUD ADVERTISING

reviews.author: Manasa Kushi
reviews.content: Zero stars. Their trial pack is misleading. What looks like a simple trial turns into a subscription issue, and getting help from support is a struggle. Not clear, not transparent, and not ethical for a financial app. Very disappointing experience.

reviews.author: Vikrant Raut
reviews.content: Misleading performance and poor execution in real trades. Impossible to achieve advertised returns. In reality, after charges, profits are negligible. Customer support avoids real issues and shifts blame instead of addressing concerns. Also, subscription structure is confusing — even after paying, multiple additional plans are pushed. Overall feels like a marketing-driven setup rather than a practical trading service. Looks like well-organized scam. Don’t fall for SEBI registration marketing

reviews.author: Darshan C G
reviews.content: basket options get undone the next day. funds starts depleting even when you are not trading. which is total scam pathetic calls. notifications always comes late, profits are booked with 1-2% but losses goes below 30% in many cases. scalper is slow, you always get random rates

reviews.author: Manoj Soni
reviews.content: very poor service I booked a service through the Univest app, but something went wrong and the app debited an incorrect amount i.e 10500/- from my bank account. I contacted customer support, but no resolution or reply yet. This is unacceptable for a payment app. Please refund my money and improve your support!

reviews.author: Sameer Karania
reviews.content: The stock recommendations they give are not at all worth trading. They have more than 50 open trades all in loss. there is no stop loss and they continue holding it till it comes in profit.

reviews.author: fahad shafi
reviews.content: worst app u can waste ur money on ...u take a certain plan and open the app the only thing that pops up is upgrade ur plan by paying this and that no real use just a way to extract money from customers...also they keep u calling for opening demat account upgrading ur plans in short extracting more money

reviews.author: Amit K T
reviews.content: I am very disappointed with your service. There is no customer care number or any proper option in the application to contact customer support. Because of this, it is very difficult for customers to resolve their issues.

reviews.author: udayan mondal
reviews.content: Hidden AMC charges,poor customer support (1day delayed responses),and average trade execution very disappointing.The new “Scalper” feature is paid,while many other apps offer similar tools for free.I never received contract notes despite their system showing emails were sent,which is very concerning. Their premium stock call service is even worse most trades went into loss,and later they advised adding 100% more quantity,increasing risk and losses.Complete loss of money and time.B alrt fk review

reviews.author: madina shaik
reviews.content: Because of your app, I’ve lost 60,000 so far! There is absolutely no balance between risk and reward. I make 1,000 in profit, but I lose 15,000! This is completely unacceptable and very frustrating!

reviews.author: VIJAY ANTONY DSOUZA
reviews.content: I am a Pro Gold subscriber for the past 5 years. My experience has been disappointing. Promised features and advisor support are not provided, and most content is no longer accessible unless I pay again. Brokerage is advertised as ₹5 but ₹18 is charged during trading. Customer support is poor and often unhelpful. Please be cautious before subscribing.

reviews.author: Muhammad Shahbaz
reviews.content: Beware of paid positive REVIEWS on this app.. I downloaded it after watching an ad, and wasted my money. It's worthless, app interface is too hard even for mid traders. 50% of the app screen is filled by their own ads selling their pro plans. You better give your money to a real broker and he will earn you some profit. I traded on their recommendation, ending in a 20% loss. No expert review, just random trade picking. No 1v1 support. Not suitable for beginners AT ALL... DON'T WASTE YOUR 💵

reviews.author: Rishabh Singhal
reviews.content: Overwhelming Sales Calls After PurchaseDownloaded Univest and got the Pro Lite membership for stock insights. Shortly after, calls started: 3-4 times a day pushing Demat accounts or upgrades, even on weekends at 10 AM. Hang up once, and they call right back.It's disruptive once they have your info. I'd prefer not to buy or download to avoid this.

reviews.author: HC Photography
reviews.content: Not user friendly application, and i add fund of 10000 but still they cannot put order for buy new stock and showing continuously to add fund. n while i try to withdraw they showing you can't withdraw money because KYC pendind , so if KYC Pending then don't ask for adding money.

reviews.author: Siddhesh Jadhav
reviews.content: Please do not go with the MF Advisory Premium services. 1. I had issue with KYC 2. Its been 4 days since i completed my KYC, still the protfolio insights are not unlocked! IT team is not able to resolve this problem in the application. The team is asking phone videos and pics of the issue. so much hassle for a new user who has opted for Premium service. If you want a Premium experience on MF Advisor then the App is not ready. Team is supportive but it spoils the overall experience.

reviews.author: Prabhat Sharma
reviews.content: 1-need improvement in order placing time as the order not getting settled timely on exchange,some orders showing on hold or not getting place at the same time. 2-Comodity trading also required in app 3-Need improvement in trading ideas also 4-Customer support is very poor I have tried many times but the given support number never get connected. 5-Request call back option is also not suitable traders bcoz if you add a request today you will get call back by tomorrow or day after tomorrow.

reviews.author: Vishal Telang
reviews.content: Application is not smooth enough for trading, charts are not updated with speed, trade execution is not fast. poor experience

reviews.author: Srinivas Chary
reviews.content: after 3 months my account was activated, my subscription expired this month and I purchased the stocks and options and lost around 30k from last one year.. request you please extend my subscription

reviews.author: Nitin Bane
reviews.content: subscription advertisement shown to users already subscribed too irritating! date and time of recommendation should be shown in all messages if we have to open app from telegram channel then what is the use of telegram channel

reviews.author: raj kiran
reviews.content: the initial recommendations for stock trading from the app are all under loss for now. the most irritating part is the number of call for selling some or the other plan. I have told them to stop calling for plans...but they keep calling trying to sell plans. The plans itself are so many and so confusing. once we open the app... we have to navigate across too many links for buying their plans. It does not go straight to the home page. Lots and lots of link to buy some or the other plan.

reviews.author: Theja Ravi
reviews.content: I am unable to receive the Pro Trades Notifications and each time I am checking in Telegram and then from there I am going to App. I am using Samsung S20FE 5G. is there anything from my end need to do to receive app notifications or it's a problem in the app.

reviews.author: Manish Kansara
reviews.content: Facing Problem with App doesn't open maximum times. pls solve this problem.

reviews.author: Madanmohan B
reviews.content: one of the trades suggested in univest app. has hit the stop loss. but still it is recommended in the live trades. for users who entered the trade is got squared off due to stop loss triggered. when trades are rolled over there is no message or intimation. I have just taken a pro subscription. made some little profits. but one stop loss triggered has wiped out the total profit made. univest should improve the status and messages.

reviews.author: Ramathe bee Ramathe bee
reviews.content: The Univest app has carved out a specific niche in the Indian stock market by focusing on one of the most difficult parts of investing: knowing when to exit. While most apps focus on what to buy, Univest positions itself as a "Financial GPS" that helps you manage your existing portfolio and new trades with SEBI-registered research. ​Here is a comprehensive review of the app as of 2026.

reviews.author: Varun Bansal
reviews.content: Its a okay app if you want to invest in equity. But their futures recommendation is the worst part. They do not provide any stoploss and may close the future trade anytime they want. Within minutes, by the time u check the message to sell it, it will already make a huge debt on you. They are just trying to make some profits from stocks that are showing some significant increase as there is not much fundamental analysis done by them. I have traded and witnessed the results myself.

reviews.author: Mithun M
reviews.content: Calls are good. But the entry or exit price you give will be out of range. Eg, if the entry price is given as 100 it ll be already 105 by the time it appear in the notification. And in same example sometimes u ll give exit at 102, so the entry which v get n exit price u give, ll make us in loss, which is too bad. Useless many times. I know many will be facing the same issue.

reviews.author: Shashank Shekhar
reviews.content: I've Lost More Than I've Gained. I bought a subscription based on the app's high "hit accuracy" claim, which is very misleading. They manipulate this stat by quietly closing loss-making "short-term" trades, sometimes months later, without any alert or stop-loss. They don't tell you to exit a losing position; they just close it on their end to boost their accuracy percentage. I've lost money on more trades than I've profited. The app's real performance doesn't match the stats they show. Avoid it.

reviews.author: M Channabasavaraj
reviews.content: I bought 1 year subscription in equity only. Issue is when ever they post a trade for stock for short term, it will be out of range (hitting upper circuit) which is a major drawback and UNIVEST need to think seriously on it. It this is case, what's fun in taking the subscription.

reviews.author: imran khan
reviews.content: After 5 months usage noticed few major issues 1)Always Cross check their stock recommendations under "Idea" section, before buying search it in "Search any stock" section,they contradict with each other sometimes. 2) Univest does not provide notifications when they close a call or revise a target price.3)their stock recommendations are often provided at a time when the stock has already opened above the suggested price,yet Univest still claims to have suggested entry at that price.  Be careful.

reviews.author: Univest refer code- EFBUZUJG
reviews.content: Calls don't show up like they're supposed to, just comes up as a missed call (video or audio) and even if all messages are read, it's telling Facebook itself that I have an unread message when I don't. It also tells me I'm not connected to any sort of wifi or mobile data when I am, and have good connection. I've also had issues with messages not wanting to send. I'll have to either connect or disconnect from wifi to get it to go through.

reviews.author: Prateek Kumar Agrawal
reviews.content: I have been using univest for few months now and have opted for stock recommendations only. My review is not just based on a single stock. It is based on observations that I have made in few months. My review - Their calls in stock doesn't work the way it should. Will not buy the subscription again.

reviews.author: Santanu Brahma
reviews.content: Without reason and repeated notifications is ridiculous. I am no happy with the intention as they are trying to force subscribe for the app. I installed 2days back and not even trust it but they are forcefully trying to subscribe. Lots of notifications they don't have notification control or alert preference.

reviews.author: Roopesh Suvarna
reviews.content: App is good only if u buy the stock on time but they keep on spamming to buy their plans in this cases we miss the genieune calls to buy as they keep spamming even if you buy their plans. So I didn't find any value added unless they keep a seperate number to give stock recommendation.

reviews.author: Bhushan bodkhe
reviews.content: bad experience app not showing real time values..p&L not change more than 20 to 30 seconds.. coustomer care not received call

reviews.author: Mayank Jaiswal
reviews.content: I bought 2 delivery stocks in 1 month and now both stocks are negative. 1 stock is 25% down and 1 is 8% down

reviews.author: Ranjan Pankaj
reviews.content: I shifted my trading account to Univest recently and honestly the broking experience has been smooth. Order execution is fast, margins are clearly displayed, and I don't face random rejections like with my earlier broker. What I love most is that I can check research and instantly place the trade without switching apps. It saves me so much time during market hours. If they add mutual funds and bonds too, then I don't think I will need to maintain any other account.

reviews.author: Praveenlal Edappala
reviews.content: It is impossible to predict for a 100% bet on profit in any stock. Almost calls are without stoploss. Highlighting gains on few for 3-6%. But on the other hand, the miss target exit calls are in huge loss and wipe out all small profits. So advising any stock, future or option without a stoploss is as good as advising jumping in to a hell...

reviews.author: k kumar
reviews.content: Returns are miniscule for the long holding period. No stop losses are given. Not possible to divide capital for the number of calls that are given, especially the open calls. Most of them go below purchase price and stay there for a long time before suddenly hitting the target. App is extremely cluttered with them trying to capture every segment and constantly sending updates to purchase the next higher plan. Waste of money for me..

reviews.author: Vinu Prakash
reviews.content: NOT GOOD AT ALL. BE REALISTIC. Don't go by their plain numbers...First of all, you have to consider a minimum 30% slippage of their claimed profits because of the late entry and exit due to delayed notification. Secondly because of no stoploss, whatever profit you have accumulated over let's say 10 profitable trades, you will lose all of them if not more, in the other 1 or 2 losing trades..Whats the point then in investing time and money in this?

reviews.author: Ashish Raj
reviews.content: Try to improve app interface , after having subscription or being a member also we are getting so many ads to buy subscription & all which makes it worse and everywhere not only in app we get so many ads through whatsapp and telegram notification , which makes the app interface worse ,we lose important message like recommendation of new trade because of this.. hope you will understand.... Make it easy to use atleast for them ,who bought your membership

reviews.author: Ganesh Perumal
reviews.content: Wanted to give 2 star but after booking profit dint want to do that. Major problem I faced was.contacting the customer service. I had paid for 3months pro super and i am offered only 1 customer call in 72 hours. Now there was guide to invest and after investing that guide was deleted. I couldnt call the team to ask about what to do with the amount invested as I had to wait 72 hours for my call to be attended!! Rrduced one star caz i now lost 15k from option trading. Not to blame the team..but!!

reviews.author: ankit morbia
reviews.content: App is good ...I've taken only 2-3 trade right now but you should not post return on basis of entry which you take...by the time you post the entry the value of stock is increased so if you post 3-4% on app it's actually on 2% to users...you should post return by considering the higher price band of range which you give

reviews.author: SUMIT GIRI
reviews.content: I have used the app for 3 months now. I bought the stock feature pack. 1. I won't recommend anyone to use it caz the calls they give will get you max income of 2-5%(if you sell at the target they provide). 2. While some of the stocks will not hit the target price as they provide,and they will make you hold it for 3 months and tell to close it 30% loss. 3. So eventhough they show 80-90% accuracy it is just a trap caz they will make you loose 30% in 1 trade while you will benefit (2-5)% in 5trades

reviews.author: Ronak Panchal
reviews.content: Stock recommendation not as good as they are charging. Creating good marketing to make customer, within 2-3year they will disappear. No clear cut stock recommendation instead of that more ad of thier own to upgrade this package,,,that package.... waste of money

reviews.author: ashar tauseef
reviews.content: Inflated numbers, ypu may earn 1 -2k in a lot but Unviset inflates the number and shows profit of 8-9k, may be they do get right calls what to buy but by the time any idea comes it will already beyond the price limit, and as soon as the idea is publishes it starts showing 4-5k gain already🤣

reviews.author: Sachin Wadikhaye
reviews.content: Download only if you have money to give away every day on their plans rather than the investments.... I am fedup with their plans they are so confusing. you will buy one plan then they will lure you for another plan . then again . and cycle continues.. till you are forced to write a review on it. also there is no way you can cancel the subscription from the app.

reviews.author: Capricon Cap
reviews.content: Was planning to subscribe for their pro plan. A good app is always confident that they could provide a trial plan in low price. Here, the minimum price for subscription is 2K. After seeing the reviews, it's clear the app is manipulating the lost trades. Heavy spamming in WhatsApp. Haven't got a call at least.

reviews.author: Ranjan Kumar Basak
reviews.content: I am writing to express my frustration regarding the repeated OTP login issue. For the past two consecutive days, I have been unable to receive the OTP required to log in, which is causing serious inconvenience. I truly appreciate your platform’s interface, which is why I chose it over others like Groww, Zerodha, and Angel One. I was also planning to consolidate my investments from other platforms into your account. However, if such a basic issue persists, it seriously affects my trust.

reviews.author: srikanth mg
reviews.content: Do not invest in Elite plans. Low interest rate. FDs are better where I can break if required. The said returns are not even close to what it claims and there is no option to take the money in between, it's locked for the entire duration. I've invested in it thinking that I'll get near to 12% interest per annum. But, I'm not even getting 7%. I'm getting just over 6% which I felt like the team has cheated me by giving false lucrative interest rates.

reviews.author: aks Jain
reviews.content: Practically it is not possible to make profit from this investment ideas as there is no specific amount per month and they keep posting trade ideas everyday. We cannot invest eveyday if the stock is stuck in negative, so our funds are trapped too. They only post profit trades, I can share loss trades, so far ideas are stuck at -23% at an average and my funds are also stuck.

reviews.author: Rahul Sarda
reviews.content: Not worth! 1. by the time you get the notification about new trade, it would have made move of 3000-4000 up or down side. 2. fixed set of screener, however no provision to create and save, alert custom screeners.

reviews.author: Prashanth Reddy Bimal
reviews.content: Major issue I faced with univest was logging in, when the app got struck I went back to home screen & opened the app but it never launched, later I Uninstalled & installed the app after trying to re-launch the app but it never logged in or generated the OTP, this is a serious issue please look into it.....

reviews.author: Syed Shaukat
reviews.content: The app doesnt provide proper details of trades.. plus its money hungry attitude is always popping up offers and subscriptions..asking for charges .. more focussed towards getting fees.. not even a proper contract note of trades is sent through mail.. forget MTF.... simply not worth a paid subscription.

reviews.author: Abhishek Kanwal
reviews.content: I have a 5-year commodity plan with them. Their accuracy is correct, but their buying and selling prices are manipulated to increase profit and show less loss. Overall, it is a decent app.

reviews.author: Rohit
reviews.content: now we are getting Telegram messages also in Hindi. Univest has to create Hindi & English only channels. They should at least mention numbers in English in Webinars. otherwise, their stock suggestions are good, but sometimes the timing is back. Anyway, they have taught me how to invest for the long term through their webinars, which is very helpful. App has issues with notifications from years, which they need to fix.

reviews.author: Shubham Jain
reviews.content: observing issue on app launch, getting black screen with Univest logo. it is not proceeding till app homepage. I emailed regarding the same yesterday but no response received.

reviews.author: Aaryan Golkar
reviews.content: This app is a must-have for any investor. The consolidated view of stocks, MFs, and SIPs is incredibly helpful. I feel much more organized and in control of my finances.

reviews.author: Seetharaman V
reviews.content: Very good user-friendly App. Prediction is 60 persent accuracy. But while opening your app the promotion and plan offers create a lot of nusence, only after scipping this page only we are able to use this app for trade and prediction is very bad.

reviews.author: mote srikanth
reviews.content: 06.02.2026 Univest enabled an AutoPay mandate in a way that was not clearly explained and felt misleading. Even after the trial, they insist on AutoPay. I contacted PhonePe customer support, and they clearly explained that AutoPay can be deleted after the trial without any money deduction, and they helped me cancel it successfully. PhonePe support genuinely saved me from an unwanted auto-debit. Disappointed with Univest. Univest,Don't make customers panic please 🙏

reviews.author: Sharath S
reviews.content: Got a customer call from the Univest where in a person named Puneeth started to speak in Hindi which I questioned that, has he been directed to speak in Hindi to customer without asking the preferred language. He said Yes and do I have any problem. This Arrogance or company's policy of speaking in Hindi without asking the language of preference will not be viewed in a better context from customer point of view. Hope you change the attitude, and better speak in English or Local language of state.

reviews.author: Manu Batra मनु बत्रा
reviews.content: Not a Good really time app. all profitable trades are suggested to be close with small profits and loss making trades are on hold for ever. example targets at 20 points above but they will always close in 3-4 points profit, however if the SL is 20 points they will never close it at 15 points loss also. so profits will always be small and losses are BIG. Do not open demat account with them, coz of poor refresh rate. prices and P&L do not refresh automatically.

reviews.author: Krishan Singh
reviews.content: Please add new features in app, total invest value, profit & loss total charges show in one tap...

reviews.author: Krishna Sen Gupta
reviews.content: Love the daily updates and market news section.

reviews.author: Muraleedharan Koluthappallil
reviews.content: The app quickly tookaway 600INR from me naming it subscription with no mention of how much I can withdraw after 3 months! The app is full of their own ads.

reviews.author: Jaivir Pal
reviews.content: Bahut useful app hai, stock tips mast milte hain.

reviews.author: Manasa Manasa
reviews.content: I have been using this app for some time, but I haven't found the recommendations very useful and profitable. Most of the short-term 3-6 months recommendation eventually ended up negative returns. I am not an options user, so I can't comment on that. May be someone using might rate later. Also, the alerts are late many times. Until then, the buying range is missed.

reviews.author: ROHIT PANDEY
reviews.content: I didn't subscribe yet but I have gone through their past trades and one thing I found that the risk reward ratio is very poor for each and every trade especially in future and option. Most of the time profit is aound 2000 but loss is 8000. You get profit in 4 trades but you lost all in a single trade. In my view, if we put subscription charges, brokerage, slippage and risk reward ratio all together, it will be very difficult to be in profit.

reviews.author: Mahesh C Sharma
reviews.content: stock recommendation are good, but their data is wrong. for example - if they give a recommendation for buy a stock at Rs 100, and you open app instantly, the stock already trading at 101-102, means, stock is trading at 1-2% up. then, when they give notification for sell stock at 104, stock trading at 103. means, you save only 1-2% in short-term recommendation. no one can buy at 100, and no one can sell at 104. but at other part, their stock selection is very good 👍

reviews.author: Sagar S
reviews.content: "The thing i appreciate most about univest is the trust factor. every stock suggestion comes with data, charts, and a clear explanation. i’m no longer confused about what to invest in or when to exit. the app has become my daily go-to for tracking my portfolio and getting reliable insights. it’s honestly better than many paid platforms."

reviews.author: Mrityunjay Biradar
reviews.content: Stock suggestions are good with all technical analysis and fundamental analysis , but these are good for long term stocks, if you are looking for short-term, the prices would have reached the target price at the time of notification itself. Also for longterm stocks if it can provide multiple targets it would be good.

reviews.author: kaushal sheth
reviews.content: In messges they will highlight profitable trade with absolute and percentage returns. In loss making trades they ll just tell you to exit without highlighting how much loss. Honesty is most important. When loss increases they give multiple future trades which not viable with limited capital. Seems like entry to trade suggested bit later so one can never execute trade at their entry price. Otherwise certain picks are good but need to refine more.

reviews.author: Faiz Aalam
reviews.content: Very informative and beginner friendly*

reviews.author: Nagaraj Nidagundi
reviews.content: I started using this app from past few weeks. Suggestion of stock are okey butvthe problem is by the time user see the recommendation and try try to buy or sell, stock price already out of rage, it's challenging to buy or sell at recommend price as the profit is only between 6 To 7% . I don't know how Univest will fix this issue.

reviews.author: Rajesh Gupta (RG)
reviews.content: average return per share 2 to 4 percent only but loss per share 10 to 20 percent. I am not happy with univest stock suggestion and their multibaggar share performance is down by 40 percent

reviews.author: Nilesh Choubisa
reviews.content: It is good to have all the market details consolidated and at one place. But It is better to do our own research than dependency on tips, most of the stock recommendations now days are in negative.

reviews.author: gaurav jain
reviews.content: the only problem with the app is that stoploss is not given in most of trades. although their hit ratio is quite high but I would suggest them to give stoploss as well in every trade idea. overall I am ok with subscription.

reviews.author: Chandan Kumar Mahato
reviews.content: Why do you have the option to use scalper from your website? why I I have to keep putting on the indicators I use on every straike chart I select everyday?

reviews.author: Sandeep Sharma
reviews.content: If Open High Low scanner is added i think it would be better and it woulx bd great if we can open chart for any given scrips suggested by app,which is a very big drawback of this app,charts are not available

reviews.author: Kaushik Ganguly
reviews.content: I subscribed for the Pro Lite plan for a year. Apparently none of the services offered, qualify as paid service as such.Just checked the basic screeners and found no real value. Even simple 50 DMA 200 DMA crossovers are provided at least 10 trading days after the actual crossover. Seems I have wasted my money on this subscription, just waiting to see how profitable really the trade recommdations are.

reviews.author: Bhavik G
reviews.content: Overall good app Just one query why univest book profit in short term calls in just around 3% profit in couple of days as stocks was properly analyst and researched with provide time frame for 1-3 months...

reviews.author: Sagar Khasare
reviews.content: The chart pattern is not viewable. U have to switch on next app to view the charts. it gives u the details of share perfectly. I would request the developer to look into matter and update the charts in the app

reviews.author: Nikunj Doshi
reviews.content: just start using the app. the dividend history is not shown correctly. example. i searched for PFS which declares regular dividends. bit the app says no dividends declared pls recheck the datA

reviews.author: vamsi boppana
reviews.content: Worst option calls, min 2k loss on each call. They hide losses while advertising. Stock calls were decent, 3-4% profit in the short term. App notifications and sync is good.

reviews.author: Firoz A Patel
reviews.content: This app is really good but atleast you should provide few stuffs for free of cost. It ll be very helpful for newbies in the market.

reviews.author: Nash Nazar
reviews.content: Install the app and now because of just one reason that it doesn't support dark mode. If ever you guys support dark mode I will be happy to reinstall and use your app.

reviews.author: Prince Kumar
reviews.content: Nice crypto features

reviews.author: Vinoth Kumar
reviews.content: Good for beginners. Expert calls are as usual only even you can learn from normal videos on YouTube . Not that much exclusive content provided in expert calls .

reviews.author: Binshi T
reviews.content: This app is not very useful and profitable. Most of the short-term month recommendation eventually ended up negative returns.

reviews.author: Xyx Abc
reviews.content: Application is useful for beginner to watch and learn things related to stock market but there are some issues 1. there is no website. 2. No memory management for app.

reviews.author: ASWATHI K
reviews.content: Univest is a convenient trading app. It's money making platform. I think it is 95% reliable earning app

reviews.author: Adam macson
reviews.content: Woo nice app for trading and learning about the trade... Save and secure money transfer. IT is useful app for bachelors

reviews.author: Manas Sharma
reviews.content: Major drawback is you cannot invest directly from Univest using your old demat account or app. either you have to open your new univest Demat account or get out of the app and invest from existing demat account. also UI is difficult to understand.

reviews.author: Sk Singh
reviews.content: Univest is auser _ friendly app for earning extra in come through various tasks and surveys -the interface is intuitive making ieeasy to navigate for users of ull experience levels .payment rents are prompt and the app offers a variety of withdrawal options.👍👍

reviews.author: RAKSHIT PATHAK
reviews.content: Having problem of black screen... Allowed all the permission... Still everytime it is having problem of black screen.

reviews.author: Ajaay Khurana
reviews.content: I have recently started using the universities app. it is very convenient & customer friendly. A lot of educational information is available in this app. So far trade recommendations given are productive. The only concern is that the notifications are received a bit late, prices are already moved up above the recommendation price. Further, Stop losses are very big . when trade is moving in the opposite direction , losses are also on the higher side.Keep small SL.

reviews.author: Shanthala Ka
reviews.content: Univest has revolutionised the way of investing. I just started in Aug 2025 and have already made profit with 25% in 1.5 months. The app recommendation for short term, mid term and the notification for upcoming dividends, makes it easy for new comers. Worth the investment for the fee you pay. But sometimes, I have seen that app is hanging and not able to open up. This can be improved.

reviews.author: Madhu Bala
reviews.content: Univest offers a surprising number of free tools-like stock analysis, webinars, market insights, and IPO details-without any hidden charges. It's refreshing to see an app that prioritizes your learning and growth over making money off of you. Plus, the trial before purchase is a nice touch. Univest is my all-in-one solution.

reviews.author: Nikhil Pawar
reviews.content: The UniVest app is quite good. the notifications on the group are timely, which is really helpful. However, the trade alerts on the app come a bit late. Because of this, we often end up entering trades at a slightly higher price. If the entry alert could come 2-3 minutes earlier, that would be great. Also, it would be very useful if we get a group alert a few minutes before exiting a trade, so that we can be better prepared. This small change can make a big difference

reviews.author: Amarnath Jangde
reviews.content: The app is fabulous and smart work for stock selection like fundamental, breakouts, screeners, shark trader, invester etc. I am fully satisfied. But my little request for this apps developers is please give a chart analysis platform for dirtctly from stocks recommended by you and anybody. Because when we have going to the stock and select the stocks chart it's shows not available. 1.mention the sector & industry with stocks. 2.sectorwise list of stocks 3.sector perform 4.all time high,month hig.

reviews.author: Rajat Malik
reviews.content: Have been using the app for more than a month now. The calls given actually works and most of their calls hit the target. If we belive the data, it simply means that for short term calls, yoy have the potential to generate approx 6% return every month (72% anually) on your invested amount, which is great way for a passive income. The only issue I faced was with push notifications. I am being told that a new in app notification feature will be launched by mar-apr'24 timeframe which will be great

reviews.author: veadi Namdeo
reviews.content: university is the best app for stock marketing and it is easy to use it helps me too much to learn stock marking

reviews.author: Asalam Chaus
reviews.content: Helpful for both short-term and long-term investors.!

reviews.author: Sanjiv Mathew
reviews.content: Useful app with features like stock scanner etc.

reviews.author: Supriya Chakraborty
reviews.content: Most of the stocks I have selected from univest gave a fruitful outcome. But sometimes the target given by Univest do not hit n suddenly those stocks are removed from list of their suggestion. That should not be done. I think a prior notifications must be given for those stock so that we can withdraw our money

reviews.author: Ekta Agarwal
reviews.content: my experience is worst here they charged 1500 rupees on clicking 1 rs. payment..plz Don trust it they don't even solve customer queries only money making and unreliable in terms of charging money without even asking

reviews.author: shahid raza
reviews.content: “Univest Stocks is a simple investing app offering market updates, easy portfolio tracking, learning tools, and a smooth interface for beginners.”

reviews.author: Natraj Jayaraman
reviews.content: Univest is one of the best stock recommendation apps in India. The only issue is, sometimes, I've to skip some short term trades as the price has moved past the suggested entry level. Other than that, the app is pretty great, easy to use & responsive. I'm a Pro user.

reviews.author: Satvik
reviews.content: I like how the app has everything in one place—trade calls, stock analysis, market news, even learning material. Saves me from using 3–4 different apps. But I am most impressed by their GTT featurein their demat service. I get advise, place order easily and promptly and am also able to put exit target.

reviews.author: Sunita Gupta
reviews.content: this is the best app university stock bast download link bhej

reviews.author: Ashish
reviews.content: Univest is nice app. Today I saw it is coming with PRO version. My suggestion is those who have already invested in elite 12 percent they should be given pro access at no cost. Nowadays there are several options where you can get 12 pc return without paying any additional charges. Hope Univest team would consider this advice.

reviews.author: Sera Joseph
reviews.content: I'm thoroughly impressed with Univest Stock and Invest! Their platform is intuitive and easy to use, making it perfect for both beginners and experienced investors. The research tools and analytics are top-notch, helping me make informed investment decisions. I also appreciate the low fees and competitive pricing. The customer support team is knowledgeable and responsive. Univest has made investing in stocks easier

reviews.author: Vinay Kumar
reviews.content: The Help and Support service in the Univest application is efficient and user-friendly. The support team is responsive and provides clear, accurate solutions to queries. Issues are addressed in a timely manner, making the overall experience smooth and reliable. This feature adds great value to the application and enhances user satisfaction.

reviews.author: sidharthan r
reviews.content: App is great, provide stock recommendation timely. But in recent times the stock recommendation are just being closed even before achieving the target or some recommendations are closed right before entry price to show profit in the app but by the time we make a sell order it becomes loss for us.

reviews.author: Jitendra
reviews.content: The research quality is top-notch. I’ve worked with multiple advisory teams before, but Univest’s insights feel sharper and more actionable. Especially in this unpredictable market, their quick and safe returns help me trade with more confidence.

reviews.author: RANJITH MVL
reviews.content: univest application in the best application in the world. The experience has been great. Orders are processed quickly, margins are clear, and I d...

reviews.author: A Google user
reviews.content: i shifted my trading account to univest and it helped a lot

reviews.author: jasna ps
reviews.content: Its an easy app for the people who wants to increase their money through trading, and who does not have enough time for research about variating stocks. Every stockmarket variation can also present in the app itself.

reviews.author: Naidu Bapi Reddy
reviews.content: Univest is a game changer! I've been using this app for a few months now, and I must say, it has made stock investing so much easier. The UI is incredibly user-friendly, and the tools it offers, like the Al-powered analytics, help me make informed decisions. I love the feature that lets me track my portfolio's growth and receive real-time updates. It's a perfect platform for both beginners and experienced investors. Highly recommended for anyone lookingnage and grow their investments effic

reviews.author: Tejas Kumbhar
reviews.content: This investing advisor is really great but their app needs to post trades quickly. Because the time taken between Telegram notification and app is so much so that the trade is already above the entry price. I would suggest them to give trades directly on WhatsApp only to the subscribers or improve the app postings.

reviews.author: Surend
reviews.content: • I analyzed your closed trades. Truly, your analysis and accuracy are commendable. • Whether it's short-term, medium-term, or F&O, you have 75+ accuracy in all, which sets you apart from others. • Your returns are quite impressive. • The returns could be even more impressive, but there's one small issue with your stop loss – they get hit very rarely, but when they do, the percentage loss is quite large, like 12-15%, or sometimes even more. • If you can improve this aspect, it would be 🤑

reviews.author: Neeraj Sharma
reviews.content: Univest trading app offers a seamless and user friendly experience, making it easy to track and manage investments. But I will suggest their should be more information in app like demo videos for future, options, commodity It will really help us to know it's exact meaning and process.

reviews.author: Nishad Kukku
reviews.content: ✅ What I Liked: Simple and clean interface — easy to use for beginners. Useful trade ideas and stock recommendations from SEBI-registered experts. One-click trade execution and smart portfolio tools. Market updates, webinars, and stock screeners are a nice bonus. ❌ What Can Be Improved: Alerts sometimes come late, especially for fast-moving trades. Only the profitable trades are highlighted — loss-making calls are often hidden. Not ideal for F&O traders — many users faced los

reviews.author: Shreyans Jain
reviews.content: Unrequired Notification You must understand that users remain highly alert and sensitive to alerts from timing concious apps like yours. Using that to promote premium plans when already bought and force selling futures, option subscription even when not interested defeats the purpose. Give option to make them optional and its a 5 star experience.

reviews.author: Himanshu Tater
reviews.content: Team plz try & understand. Most of us who have subscribed don't have the time & enegy to do all of the analysis. Please focus on providing good & quality recommendations rather than focus on quantity. Do not try & sell any paid seminars or courses. There are tons of them already available.

reviews.author: vyshnav alenchery
reviews.content: "Univest is a great investment app for both beginners and experienced traders. The user-friendly interface makes stock trading easy, and the real-time market data helps in making informed decisions. However, it could improve by adding more advanced features for professional investors. Overall, a solid choice for those looking to grow their portfolio!

reviews.author: Aayush Bajaj
reviews.content: I'm thoroughly impressed with Univest Stock and Invest! Their platform is intuitive and easy to use, making it perfect for both beginners and experienced investors. The research tools and analytics are top-notch, helping me make informed investment decisions. I also appreciate the low fees and competitive pricing. The customer support team is knowledgeable and responsive.Univest has made investing in stocks easier.

reviews.author: Renganathan Rajagopalan
reviews.content: its app's ease of use. Call quality is also quite good. However, there is no way to go from the current plan to add extra plans, upgrading will incur additional costs. Kindly find a solution. Additionally, kindly grant web-based access.

reviews.author: santosh kumar
reviews.content: they are sending so many ad notifications to subscribe higher plans for those who have already subscribed the desired plans. so the stock notifications are less compared to the ad notifications. Although app is good.

reviews.author: Latest Movies
reviews.content: I’ve been using the Univest app for a few weeks, and I like its AI-driven stock recommendations and easy integration with brokers like Zerodha and Upstox. The insights are helpful for making informed decisions, especially for someone like me who isn’t a full-time trader.

reviews.author: Chandrasekharan KP
reviews.content: I joined very recently and trying to understand the merits of the app. I find some of the features are very easy to understand and the app seems to be user friendly. I trust you will add some more features as per the requests of other users which will be of great help to everyone. Best wishes.

reviews.author: Neha Singh
reviews.content: Interface is nice.. univest team is super and very quick to resolve your queries. User-friendly, simple, and clean user platform. Thanks alot.

reviews.author: Param Bal
reviews.content: Univest do a great job of getting user to use it because of its use friendly interface and it's mind blowing features. I recommend all to use the app. First it gives you five free trades helps you understand it. Why I rated 4stars?because it could improve in its feature. Nonetheless its very useful app for stock market to earn some money. Kudos to the dev

reviews.author: ಗಿರೀಶ್ ಪದ್ಮನಾಭನನ್
reviews.content: Suggestion is good but it's too bad for delay to reach stock & options recommendation. The time delay is up to 2 to 3 minutes. In the time the prices go up. It's very very bad and very worst.

reviews.author: Krishna Ahirwar
reviews.content: don't know anything about app just want coin 5-Star Review "I've had an amazing experience with [App Name]! It's been a game-changer for my [productivity/task management/organization] needs. *Key Benefits:* 1.

reviews.author: Anmol Thakur
reviews.content: I’ve been using Univest for a while now, and overall it’s a decent app for beginners getting into trading. The interface is simple and the stock recommendations are easy to follow, which helps if you’re not very experienced. I like that it gives regular updates and insights, but sometimes the alerts feel a bit late and not every call works out as expected. Still, for learning and getting market ideas, it’s worth trying once.

reviews.author: Naresh Singh
reviews.content: "I've tried a bunch of trading apps, but Univest is the only one that actually helps me decide when to sell. The exit signals are a lifesaver and have saved me from holding onto losing stocks way too long. The interface is super smooth, and the Al insights feel genuinely useful, not just random noise. Definitely worth a download if you want to be a smarter investor!"

reviews.author: Mother Prince
reviews.content: shifted my trading account to Univest recently and honestly the broking experience has been smooth. Order execution is fast, margins are clearly displayed, and I don't face random rejections like with my earlier broker. What I love most is that I can check research and instantly place the trade without switching apps. It saves me so much time during market hours. If they add mutual funds and bonds too, then I don't think I will need to maintain any other account. 😗 7 people found this helpful W

reviews.author: Salma Khatoon
reviews.content: : 3/9/26 I shifted my trading account to Univest recently and honestly the broking experience has been smooth. Order execution is fast, margins are clearly displayed, and I don't face random rejections like with my earlier broker. What I love most is that I can check research and instantly place the trade without switching apps. It saves me so much time during market hours. If they add mutual funds and bonds too, then I don't think I will need to maintain any other account.

reviews.author: Piyush Gurjar
reviews.content: shifted my trading account to Univest recently and honestly the broking experience has been smooth. Order execution is fast, margins are clearly displayed, and I don't face random rejections like with my earlier broker. What I love most is that I can check research and instantly place the trade without switching apps. It saves me so much time during market hours. If they add mutual funds and bonds too, then I don't think I will need to maintain any other account. 7 people found this helpful for

reviews.author: suruchi Verma
reviews.content: Univest offers a surprising number of free tools-like stock analysis, webinars, market insights, and IPO details-without any hidden charges. It's refreshing to see an app that prioritizes your learning and growth over making money off of you....

reviews.author: Harsh Jain
reviews.content: I had a question on one of their Nifty research notes during a long weekend. To my surprise, the support team replied within a few hours even though it was a holiday. That kind of commitment really builds trust.

reviews.author: Ranjita Choudhury
reviews.content: Pretty impressed with I’ve tried several trading platforms over the years, but this AI-powered trading app stands miles... Highly recommended.

reviews.author: piyush daheriya
reviews.content: Univest is one of the best trading apps I’ve used so far. The interface is very simple and user-friendly, which makes it easy even for beginners to understand. I really like the zero brokerage plans and the variety of trading options available. The advisory services are also quite helpful, especially for F&O trading ideas. Execution is fast, and overall experience has been smooth. Highly recommended for anyone looking to start or improve their trading journey!

reviews.author: Subhajit Mondal
reviews.content: This app is a game-changer! The Al insights are super helpful, and I love getting those timely buy/sell alerts. Makes investing feel less intimidating, even for a newbie like me. Definitely worth checking out

reviews.author: Dhaval Thakor
reviews.content: The app shows profits clearly, but losses are placed in a lower/hidden section, which makes it difficult to notice them. This creates confusion about the actual performance. And only use hedging in options, and even in that the profit is very minimal while the losses can be very large. So be careful before buying any subscription in the F&O segment.

reviews.author: Ajay Kumar
reviews.content: Univest offers a surprising number of free tools like stock analysis, webinars, market insights, and IPO details without any hidden charges. It’s refreshing to see an app that prioritizes your learning and growth over making money off of you. Univest is my all-in-one solution where I research, get trade ideas, and place trades conveniently in one place.

reviews.author: shibu Krishna
reviews.content: Seriously impressed! This app is a game-changer for my investments. The AI insights are super helpful, and I love getting real-time alerts. Makes trading a breeze, even for a newbie like me. Definitely recommend checking it out!

reviews.author: Surekha Phadke
reviews.content: Downloaded it yesterday and its been pretty good. Works smooth on my phone.Good experience overall. The interface is clean and everything loads fast.Just what I needed. Easy setup and runs without any problems.

reviews.author: Anurag Kujur
reviews.content: This is a really useful app for anyone interested in learning and exploring the stock market. The interface is simple and easy to understand, even for beginners. It provides stock picks, F&O strategies, and helpful insights that make trading feel less confusing..

reviews.author: Shobha Suhagiya
reviews.content: ​"I’ve tried a bunch of trading apps, but Univest is the only one that actually helps me decide when to sell. The exit signals are a lifesaver and have saved me from holding onto losing stocks way too long. The interface is super smooth, and the AI insights feel genuinely useful, not just random noise. Definitely worth a download if you want to be a smarter investor!"

reviews.author: anand jain
reviews.content: Univest provides a smooth and efficient platform for trading in stocks, F&O, and equity. The user interface is clean, intuitive, and easy to navigate for all types of investors. Their equity research is insightful and helps in making confident investment decisions. F&O recommendations are timely and backed by solid analysis. Stock suggestions often show consistent performance and reliability. Real-time updates and market insights keep users well-informed throughout the day."

reviews.author: H Padma
reviews.content: Univest has completely simplified my trading. As a professional, I don't have time for manual research, and this app does the heavy lifting for me. overall it is a good app

reviews.author: Divyansh
reviews.content: What I love the most is the real-time alerts and detailed research insights, which save a lot of time and effort. The app also offers great features like portfolio tracking, IPO insights, and advanced market screeners, making it a complete all-in-one investment platform "

reviews.author: Renuka Behrani
reviews.content: The app provides a clean and user-friendly interface which makes trading easier. I really appreciate the real-time alerts and stock analysis. It helps in making better decisions quickly. The performance has been good till now. Highly recommended for beginners "

reviews.author: free fire and pubg gameplay
reviews.content: it is good app univest application in the best application in the world. The experience has been great. Orders are processed quickly, margins are clear, and I don't face random rejections like I did with my previous broker.

reviews.content: Univest is helpful for stock market users. Provides good stock recommendations. Easy to use interface. Research-based insights are useful. Good for beginners. App runs smoothly. Overall, a useful app "

reviews.content: I used the univest app for stock recommendations and investing, insights were helpful, but alerts sometimes lagged and performance wasn't always accurate.
